property.description: The UPF must forward user-plane traffic only through valid and active GTP-U tunnels and detect inconsistencies between observed GTP-U packets and the tunnel state established by the SMF.
property.operator: <event value="COMPUTE" event_id="3" description="GTP-U packet with inconsistent TEID" boolean_expression="(gtp_u.teid != 0 and gtp_u.teid == smf.pfcp_state[smf.pfcp_state.id].teid and (timestamp - smf.pfcp_state[smf.pfcp_state.id].last_update) < 1000 and (gtp_u.teid != smf.pfcp_state[smf.pfcp_state.id].teid))"/>
